data.author: FloodShao
data.message:
Fred/crowd sim plugin (#218)

* migrating crowd_simulation_common in building_sim_plugins, with modifying CMakeLists

* migrating crowd_simulation_plugin for gazebo in building_sim_plugins, adding include and test folders in building_gazebo_plugins

* migrating crowd_simulation_ign into building_ignition_plugins. create include and test folder. Please modify the model path when running test

* remove all test file, and move the testing to branch fred/crowd_sim_plugin_test

* set actor as non-static model, because slot car will only react to non-static model

* fixing mutable _initialized problem

* remove taskmanager logic

* change raw pointer in common lib to shared_ptr

* creat read sdf interface in crowd_sim_common

* refactoring the load sdf part to common interface

* refactoring the update function include the convert part as the template function in common interface

* working refactor

* working refactor

* ignition refact, plugin initialization pass

* fix initialization bug

* crowd simulation ignition refact

* fixing the model center problem

* fixing ignition initialization problem

* fixing function name to snake_shape

* fixing code style for crowd_sim_plugin gazebo

* fixing the coding style

* fixing minor coding style

* move the target_link_libraries to ament_target_dependencies
